content.text:
Everything builds and tests pass. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

## Implemented

### Step 1: MCP Server Store & CRUD API
- **`core/api/openapi.yaml`** — Extended `MCPServerConfig` with `description`, `mode`, `status`, `registry_id`, `created_at`, `updated_at` fields. Added `SetCredentialRequest/Response`, `MarketplaceServer`, `RequiredEnvVar`, `InstallResult` schemas. Added marketplace and credential endpoints.
- **`core/api/gen/server.gen.go`** — Regenerated with all new types and interfaces
- **`core/store/store.go`** — Added `MCPServerStore` interface with full CRUD + `MCPServerFilter`
- **`core/store/mem/mcpserver.go`** — In-memory implementation with thread-safe map
- **`core/app/app.go`** — Wired `mcpServerStore` and `registryClient` into `apiServer`
- **`core/app/handlers.go`** — Replaced 5 stub handlers with real CRUD implementation

### Step 2: MCP Registry Client
- **`core/registry/types.go`** — Go types matching the official MCP Registry JSON shape
- **`core/registry/client.go`** — HTTP client with 15-min cache, `FetchAll`, `Search`, `Get` methods
- **`core/app/handlers.go`** — `ListMarketplaceServers` proxies the registry with `installed` enrichment; `InstallMarketplaceServer` derives config from registry packages and creates an MCP server entry

### Step 3: Credential Endpoint
- **`core/app/handlers.go`** — `SetMCPServerCredential` stores secrets in vault and updates server env with `vault://` references

### Tests
- **`core/store/mem/mcpserver_test.go`** — CRUD, not-found errors, status filter
- **`core/registry/client_test.go`** — Fetch, search, get, caching, error handling

All 15 existing tests continue to pass, plus 8 new tests.

git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat(marketplace): add MCP server CRUD, registry proxy, and credential storage

Implement the backend for MCP marketplace integration:

- MCPServerStore interface + in-memory implementation for server config persistence
- Full CRUD handlers replacing the previous 501 stubs on /v1/mcp-servers
- MCP Registry client proxying the official registry at registry.modelcontextprotocol.io
  with 15-minute caching and search support
- Marketplace endpoints: GET /v1/marketplace/servers (browse/search with installed
  enrichment), POST /v1/marketplace/servers/{id}/install (one-click install from registry)
- Credential endpoint: POST /v1/mcp-servers/{id}/credentials stores secrets in vault
  and updates server env with vault:// references
- Extended MCPServerConfig schema with status, mode, registry_id, description, timestamps
- Unit tests for store CRUD, registry client fetch/search/cache/errors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

gh pr create --title "feat(marketplace): MCP server CRUD, registry proxy, and credential storage" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary

- **MCP Server CRUD API**: Implements the five `/v1/mcp-servers` endpoints (previously returning 501 stubs) with full create, read, update, delete backed by a new `MCPServerStore` interface and in-memory implementation
- **MCP Registry Proxy**: New `GET /v1/marketplace/servers` endpoint proxies the official MCP Registry (`registry.modelcontextprotocol.io`) with 15-minute caching, search filtering, and `installed` enrichment. `POST /v1/marketplace/servers/{id}/install` provides one-click install from the registry.
- **Credential Storage**: New `POST /v1/mcp-servers/{id}/credentials` endpoint stores secrets in the vault and updates server env with `vault://` references, integrating with the existing credential injection path

## Test plan

- [x] `MCPServerStore` unit tests: CRUD operations, not-found errors, status filter
- [x] Registry client unit tests: fetch, search, get, caching, error handling (all use `httptest.Server` fixtures)
- [x] All existing core tests continue to pass
- [ ] Integration tests against running services (`task up && task test:integration`)
- [ ] Verify new endpoints appear in Scalar API docs at `/docs`

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
EOF
)"
